description: Google Cloud Service Directory is a managed registry for publishing, discovering, and resolving services and endpoints across environments. It lets users organize namespaces, services, and endpoints and query them over API, gRPC, or DNS-backed discovery patterns.
summary: Service Directory on servicedirectory.googleapis.com exposes one authenticated REST API at https://servicedirectory.googleapis.com/v1 plus access through the Google Cloud CLI (`gcloud service-directory`); no GraphQL or MCP surface was found.
